templates.name: Task Completion Chain
templates.description: Automatically creates a follow-up task when a task is completed

templates.name: Overdue Invoice Reminder
templates.description: Sends email to customer when invoice becomes overdue, then notifies project owner after 7 days

actionConfig.subject: Invoice {{invoice.invoiceNumber}} is overdue
actionConfig.body:
Dear {{customer.name}},

Your invoice {{invoice.invoiceNumber}} is now overdue. Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience.

actionConfig.title: Invoice {{invoice.invoiceNumber}} still overdue
actionConfig.message: Invoice {{invoice.invoiceNumber}} for {{customer.name}} has been overdue for 7 days.

templates.name: Budget Alert Escalation
templates.description: Notifies admins when a project budget threshold is reached

actionConfig.title: Budget alert: {{project.name}}
actionConfig.message: Project {{project.name}} has reached its budget threshold.

templates.name: New Project Welcome
templates.description: Sends a welcome notification to project members when a project becomes active

actionConfig.title: Welcome to {{project.name}}
actionConfig.message: Project {{project.name}} is now active. You can start logging time and creating tasks.

templates.name: Document Review Notification
templates.description: Notifies project owner when a document is accepted

actionConfig.title: Document accepted: {{document.name}}
actionConfig.message: A document has been accepted in project {{project.name}}.

templates.name: Proposal Follow-up (5 days)
templates.description: Notifies the sender 5 days after a proposal is sent if no response has been received

actionConfig.title: Proposal follow-up: {{customer.name}}
actionConfig.message: A proposal sent to {{customer.name}} 5 days ago has not yet received a response. Consider following up.

templates.name: Request Complete Follow-up
templates.description: Creates a review task when an information request is completed

actionConfig.taskDescription: Information request has been completed. Please review the submitted documents.
